citations.desc: Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being.
citations.narrative:
At the time of inspection, there was no documented program of environmental enhancement for the nonhuman primates
housed at the facility.
An adequate environmental enhancement program is essential in promoting the psychological well-being of non-human
primates. Dealers, exhibitors, and research facilities must develop, document, and follow an appropriate plan for
environment enhancement adequate to promote the psychological well-being of non-human primates. This plan must be
made available to APHIS upon request.
Correct by 5/20/2026
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
n

narrative:
3.81 
   
Environment enhancement to promote psychological well-being. 
At the time of inspection, there was no documented program of environmental enhancement for the nonhuman primates 
housed at the facility. 
 
An adequate environmental enhancement program is essential in promoting the psychological well-being of non-human 
primates. Dealers, exhibitors, and research facilities must develop, document, and follow an appropriate plan for 
environment enhancement adequate to promote the psychological well-being of non-human primates. This plan must be 
made available to APHIS upon request. 
 
Correct by 5/20/2026 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
